channel.title: How to load a local page
channel.description:
Hi there,
I'm wondering if I can load a local page instead of fetching from wordpress.
As it's not possible to fetch everything from wordpress, I would like to create my own page in react and display it.
If that is possible, how would that can be accomplished?
Kind regards,
Fernando

item.title: How to load a local page
item.dc:creator: fernandofas
item.description:
Hi there,

I’m wondering if I can load a local page instead of fetching from wordpress.

As it’s not possible to fetch everything from wordpress, I would like to create my own page in react and display it.

If that is possible, how would that can be accomplished?

Kind regards,

Fernando

Read full topic
item.source: How to load a local page
